datasets.name: warehouses
queryLines:
-- databricks-labs-queue-breaker/0.1.0  (Databricks Labs usage telemetry marker)
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT compute.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, workspace_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_queries,
    SUM(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms > 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued_queries,
    ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) AS pct_queued,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms END)/1000.0,1) AS avg_queue_s,
    ROUND(approx_percentile(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms END, (CASE :pct WHEN 'Max' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'p95' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'p90' THEN 0.90 WHEN 'p75' THEN 0.75 WHEN 'p50' THEN 0.50 ELSE 0.95 END))/1000.0,1) AS pctl_queue_s,
    ROUND(MAX(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms)/1000.0,1) AS max_queue_s,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN date(start_time) END) AS queue_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN spilled_local_bytes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS spill_queries,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN spilled_local_bytes>0 THEN spilled_local_bytes END)/1e9,2) AS avg_spill_gb,
    SUM(spilled_local_bytes) AS spill_bytes_total,
    MAX(spilled_local_bytes) AS spill_bytes_max,
    SUM(read_bytes) AS read_bytes_total
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE compute.type='WAREHOUSE' AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
    AND start_time >= current_date() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  GROUP BY compute.warehouse_id, workspace_id
  HAVING queued_queries > 0 OR spill_queries > 0
),
q AS (
  SELECT compute.warehouse_id AS wid, start_time AS a,
    timestampadd(MILLISECOND, CAST(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms AS INT), start_time) AS b
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE compute.type='WAREHOUSE' AND waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms > 1000
    AND start_time >= current_date() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
),
ev AS (SELECT wid, a AS ts, 1 AS d FROM q UNION ALL SELECT wid, b AS ts, -1 AS d FROM q),
run AS (SELECT wid, ts, SUM(d) OVER (PARTITION BY wid ORDER BY ts, d DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS depth FROM ev),
dep AS (SELECT wid, MAX(depth) AS peak_depth,
        CAST(ROUND(approx_percentile(depth, (CASE :pct WHEN 'Max' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'p95' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'p90' THEN 0.90 WHEN 'p75' THEN 0.75 WHEN 'p50' THEN 0.50 ELSE 0.95 END))) AS INT) AS pctl_depth FROM run GROUP BY wid),
whcfg AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_size, warehouse_type, min_clusters, max_clusters FROM (
    SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_size, warehouse_type, min_clusters, max_clusters,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn
    FROM system.compute.warehouses WHERE delete_time IS NULL
  ) WHERE rn=1
),
wsn AS (SELECT CAST(workspace_id AS STRING) wid, MAX(workspace_name) AS workspace_name
        FROM system.access.workspaces_latest GROUP BY CAST(workspace_id AS STRING))
SELECT a.warehouse_id, a.workspace_id, wsn.workspace_name, wc.warehouse_name,
  concat_ws(' · ', initcap(lower(replace(wc.warehouse_size,'_',' '))), initcap(lower(wc.warehouse_type))) AS wh_config,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) >= 1 AND (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Add clusters + size up'
    WHEN CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) >= 1 THEN 'Add clusters'
    WHEN (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Size up'
    ELSE 'Monitor'
  END AS recommended_action,
  CASE wc.warehouse_size
    WHEN '2X_SMALL' THEN 'X-Small' WHEN 'X_SMALL' THEN 'Small' WHEN 'SMALL' THEN 'Medium'
    WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 'Large' WHEN 'LARGE' THEN 'X-Large' WHEN 'X_LARGE' THEN '2X-Large'
    WHEN '2X_LARGE' THEN '3X-Large' WHEN '3X_LARGE' THEN '4X-Large' WHEN '4X_LARGE' THEN '4X-Large (already max)'
    ELSE NULL END AS recommended_size,
  wc.min_clusters, wc.max_clusters,
  CASE WHEN wc.max_clusters > wc.min_clusters THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS autoscaling,
  wc.max_clusters + CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) AS recommended_max,
  CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) AS clusters_to_add,
  a.spill_queries, ROUND(100.0*a.spill_queries/a.total_queries,1) AS pct_spill, COALESCE(a.avg_spill_gb,0) AS avg_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0)/1e9,2) AS total_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0)/1e9,2) AS max_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0)/NULLIF(a.read_bytes_total,0),3) AS spill_read_ratio,
  CASE WHEN (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS size_up,
  a.total_queries, a.queued_queries, a.pct_queued,
  COALESCE(a.avg_queue_s,0) AS avg_queue_s, COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0) AS pctl_queue_s,
  COALESCE(a.max_queue_s,0) AS max_queue_s, ROUND(COALESCE(a.max_queue_s,0)/60.0,1) AS max_queue_min, a.queue_days,
  COALESCE(d.peak_depth,0) AS peak_depth, COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0) AS pctl_depth,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0)>=60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_1min,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0)<10 THEN '1. <10s' WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<30 THEN '2. 10-30s'
       WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<60 THEN '3. 30-60s' WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<300 THEN '4. 1-5min'
       ELSE '5. 5min+' END AS wait_bucket
FROM agg a
LEFT JOIN dep d ON d.wid = a.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN whcfg wc ON wc.warehouse_id = a.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN wsn ON wsn.wid = CAST(a.workspace_id AS STRING)

datasets.name: daily
queryLines:
-- databricks-labs-queue-breaker/0.1.0  (Databricks Labs usage telemetry marker)
SELECT date(start_time) AS day,
  SUM(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued_queries
FROM system.query.history
WHERE compute.type='WAREHOUSE' AND start_time >= current_date() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY date(start_time)

datasets.name: kpi
queryLines:
-- databricks-labs-queue-breaker/0.1.0  (Databricks Labs usage telemetry marker)
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN pctl_queue_s >= CAST(:min_wait_sec AS DOUBLE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wh_over,
  SUM(clusters_to_add) AS clusters_to_add
FROM (
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT compute.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, workspace_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_queries,
    SUM(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms > 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued_queries,
    ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) AS pct_queued,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms END)/1000.0,1) AS avg_queue_s,
    ROUND(approx_percentile(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms END, (CASE :pct WHEN 'Max' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'p95' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'p90' THEN 0.90 WHEN 'p75' THEN 0.75 WHEN 'p50' THEN 0.50 ELSE 0.95 END))/1000.0,1) AS pctl_queue_s,
    ROUND(MAX(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms)/1000.0,1) AS max_queue_s,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN date(start_time) END) AS queue_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN spilled_local_bytes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS spill_queries,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN spilled_local_bytes>0 THEN spilled_local_bytes END)/1e9,2) AS avg_spill_gb,
    SUM(spilled_local_bytes) AS spill_bytes_total,
    MAX(spilled_local_bytes) AS spill_bytes_max,
    SUM(read_bytes) AS read_bytes_total
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE compute.type='WAREHOUSE' AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
    AND start_time >= current_date() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  GROUP BY compute.warehouse_id, workspace_id
  HAVING queued_queries > 0 OR spill_queries > 0
),
q AS (
  SELECT compute.warehouse_id AS wid, start_time AS a,
    timestampadd(MILLISECOND, CAST(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms AS INT), start_time) AS b
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE compute.type='WAREHOUSE' AND waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms > 1000
    AND start_time >= current_date() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
),
ev AS (SELECT wid, a AS ts, 1 AS d FROM q UNION ALL SELECT wid, b AS ts, -1 AS d FROM q),
run AS (SELECT wid, ts, SUM(d) OVER (PARTITION BY wid ORDER BY ts, d DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS depth FROM ev),
dep AS (SELECT wid, MAX(depth) AS peak_depth,
        CAST(ROUND(approx_percentile(depth, (CASE :pct WHEN 'Max' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'p95' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'p90' THEN 0.90 WHEN 'p75' THEN 0.75 WHEN 'p50' THEN 0.50 ELSE 0.95 END))) AS INT) AS pctl_depth FROM run GROUP BY wid),
whcfg AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_size, warehouse_type, min_clusters, max_clusters FROM (
    SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_size, warehouse_type, min_clusters, max_clusters,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn
    FROM system.compute.warehouses WHERE delete_time IS NULL
  ) WHERE rn=1
),
wsn AS (SELECT CAST(workspace_id AS STRING) wid, MAX(workspace_name) AS workspace_name
        FROM system.access.workspaces_latest GROUP BY CAST(workspace_id AS STRING))
SELECT a.warehouse_id, a.workspace_id, wsn.workspace_name, wc.warehouse_name,
  concat_ws(' · ', initcap(lower(replace(wc.warehouse_size,'_',' '))), initcap(lower(wc.warehouse_type))) AS wh_config,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) >= 1 AND (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Add clusters + size up'
    WHEN CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) >= 1 THEN 'Add clusters'
    WHEN (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Size up'
    ELSE 'Monitor'
  END AS recommended_action,
  CASE wc.warehouse_size
    WHEN '2X_SMALL' THEN 'X-Small' WHEN 'X_SMALL' THEN 'Small' WHEN 'SMALL' THEN 'Medium'
    WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 'Large' WHEN 'LARGE' THEN 'X-Large' WHEN 'X_LARGE' THEN '2X-Large'
    WHEN '2X_LARGE' THEN '3X-Large' WHEN '3X_LARGE' THEN '4X-Large' WHEN '4X_LARGE' THEN '4X-Large (already max)'
    ELSE NULL END AS recommended_size,
  wc.min_clusters, wc.max_clusters,
  CASE WHEN wc.max_clusters > wc.min_clusters THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS autoscaling,
  wc.max_clusters + CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) AS recommended_max,
  CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) AS clusters_to_add,
  a.spill_queries, ROUND(100.0*a.spill_queries/a.total_queries,1) AS pct_spill, COALESCE(a.avg_spill_gb,0) AS avg_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0)/1e9,2) AS total_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0)/1e9,2) AS max_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0)/NULLIF(a.read_bytes_total,0),3) AS spill_read_ratio,
  CASE WHEN (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS size_up,
  a.total_queries, a.queued_queries, a.pct_queued,
  COALESCE(a.avg_queue_s,0) AS avg_queue_s, COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0) AS pctl_queue_s,
  COALESCE(a.max_queue_s,0) AS max_queue_s, ROUND(COALESCE(a.max_queue_s,0)/60.0,1) AS max_queue_min, a.queue_days,
  COALESCE(d.peak_depth,0) AS peak_depth, COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0) AS pctl_depth,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0)>=60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_1min,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0)<10 THEN '1. <10s' WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<30 THEN '2. 10-30s'
       WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<60 THEN '3. 30-60s' WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<300 THEN '4. 1-5min'
       ELSE '5. 5min+' END AS wait_bucket
FROM agg a
LEFT JOIN dep d ON d.wid = a.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN whcfg wc ON wc.warehouse_id = a.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN wsn ON wsn.wid = CAST(a.workspace_id AS STRING)
)

datasets.name: spill
queryLines:
-- databricks-labs-queue-breaker/0.1.0  (Databricks Labs usage telemetry marker)
SELECT workspace_id, workspace_name, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, wh_config,
  size_up, recommended_size, spill_queries, pct_spill,
  avg_spill_gb, max_spill_gb, total_spill_gb, spill_read_ratio, total_queries
FROM (
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT compute.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, workspace_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_queries,
    SUM(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms > 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued_queries,
    ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) AS pct_queued,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms END)/1000.0,1) AS avg_queue_s,
    ROUND(approx_percentile(CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms END, (CASE :pct WHEN 'Max' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'p95' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'p90' THEN 0.90 WHEN 'p75' THEN 0.75 WHEN 'p50' THEN 0.50 ELSE 0.95 END))/1000.0,1) AS pctl_queue_s,
    ROUND(MAX(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms)/1000.0,1) AS max_queue_s,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms>1000 THEN date(start_time) END) AS queue_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN spilled_local_bytes > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS spill_queries,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN spilled_local_bytes>0 THEN spilled_local_bytes END)/1e9,2) AS avg_spill_gb,
    SUM(spilled_local_bytes) AS spill_bytes_total,
    MAX(spilled_local_bytes) AS spill_bytes_max,
    SUM(read_bytes) AS read_bytes_total
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE compute.type='WAREHOUSE' AND compute.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
    AND start_time >= current_date() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  GROUP BY compute.warehouse_id, workspace_id
  HAVING queued_queries > 0 OR spill_queries > 0
),
q AS (
  SELECT compute.warehouse_id AS wid, start_time AS a,
    timestampadd(MILLISECOND, CAST(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms AS INT), start_time) AS b
  FROM system.query.history
  WHERE compute.type='WAREHOUSE' AND waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms > 1000
    AND start_time >= current_date() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
),
ev AS (SELECT wid, a AS ts, 1 AS d FROM q UNION ALL SELECT wid, b AS ts, -1 AS d FROM q),
run AS (SELECT wid, ts, SUM(d) OVER (PARTITION BY wid ORDER BY ts, d DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS depth FROM ev),
dep AS (SELECT wid, MAX(depth) AS peak_depth,
        CAST(ROUND(approx_percentile(depth, (CASE :pct WHEN 'Max' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'p95' THEN 0.95 WHEN 'p90' THEN 0.90 WHEN 'p75' THEN 0.75 WHEN 'p50' THEN 0.50 ELSE 0.95 END))) AS INT) AS pctl_depth FROM run GROUP BY wid),
whcfg AS (
  SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_size, warehouse_type, min_clusters, max_clusters FROM (
    SELECT warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_size, warehouse_type, min_clusters, max_clusters,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY warehouse_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) rn
    FROM system.compute.warehouses WHERE delete_time IS NULL
  ) WHERE rn=1
),
wsn AS (SELECT CAST(workspace_id AS STRING) wid, MAX(workspace_name) AS workspace_name
        FROM system.access.workspaces_latest GROUP BY CAST(workspace_id AS STRING))
SELECT a.warehouse_id, a.workspace_id, wsn.workspace_name, wc.warehouse_name,
  concat_ws(' · ', initcap(lower(replace(wc.warehouse_size,'_',' '))), initcap(lower(wc.warehouse_type))) AS wh_config,
  CASE
    WHEN CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) >= 1 AND (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Add clusters + size up'
    WHEN CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) >= 1 THEN 'Add clusters'
    WHEN (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Size up'
    ELSE 'Monitor'
  END AS recommended_action,
  CASE wc.warehouse_size
    WHEN '2X_SMALL' THEN 'X-Small' WHEN 'X_SMALL' THEN 'Small' WHEN 'SMALL' THEN 'Medium'
    WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 'Large' WHEN 'LARGE' THEN 'X-Large' WHEN 'X_LARGE' THEN '2X-Large'
    WHEN '2X_LARGE' THEN '3X-Large' WHEN '3X_LARGE' THEN '4X-Large' WHEN '4X_LARGE' THEN '4X-Large (already max)'
    ELSE NULL END AS recommended_size,
  wc.min_clusters, wc.max_clusters,
  CASE WHEN wc.max_clusters > wc.min_clusters THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS autoscaling,
  wc.max_clusters + CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) AS recommended_max,
  CAST(CEIL(COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0)/10.0) AS INT) AS clusters_to_add,
  a.spill_queries, ROUND(100.0*a.spill_queries/a.total_queries,1) AS pct_spill, COALESCE(a.avg_spill_gb,0) AS avg_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0)/1e9,2) AS total_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0)/1e9,2) AS max_spill_gb,
  ROUND(COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0)/NULLIF(a.read_bytes_total,0),3) AS spill_read_ratio,
  CASE WHEN (CASE :spill_mode WHEN 'Intensity'   THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_total,0) >= 0.5 * COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) AND COALESCE(a.read_bytes_total,0) > 0 WHEN 'Peak volume' THEN COALESCE(a.spill_bytes_max,0) >= 5000000000 ELSE a.spill_queries*10 >= a.total_queries END) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS size_up,
  a.total_queries, a.queued_queries, a.pct_queued,
  COALESCE(a.avg_queue_s,0) AS avg_queue_s, COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0) AS pctl_queue_s,
  COALESCE(a.max_queue_s,0) AS max_queue_s, ROUND(COALESCE(a.max_queue_s,0)/60.0,1) AS max_queue_min, a.queue_days,
  COALESCE(d.peak_depth,0) AS peak_depth, COALESCE(d.pctl_depth,0) AS pctl_depth,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0)>=60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_1min,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(a.pctl_queue_s,0)<10 THEN '1. <10s' WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<30 THEN '2. 10-30s'
       WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<60 THEN '3. 30-60s' WHEN a.pctl_queue_s<300 THEN '4. 1-5min'
       ELSE '5. 5min+' END AS wait_bucket
FROM agg a
LEFT JOIN dep d ON d.wid = a.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN whcfg wc ON wc.warehouse_id = a.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN wsn ON wsn.wid = CAST(a.workspace_id AS STRING)
) WHERE spill_queries > 0

datasets.name: pctopts
queryLines:
-- databricks-labs-queue-breaker/0.1.0  (Databricks Labs usage telemetry marker)
SELECT col1 AS label FROM VALUES ('Max'),('p95'),('p90'),('p75'),('p50')

datasets.name: spillopts
queryLines:
-- databricks-labs-queue-breaker/0.1.0  (Databricks Labs usage telemetry marker)
SELECT col1 AS label FROM VALUES ('Frequency'),('Intensity'),('Peak volume')

lines: # 📊 DBSQL Queue Breaker — are your SQL warehouses making users wait?

Reads your workspace's `system.query.history` and finds warehouses that need more headroom, and **which lever** to pull: **Add clusters** (queries queuing at capacity → raise max clusters) or **Size up** (queries spilling to disk → bigger t-shirt size). Filter by **Workspace**, choose the **percentile**, and choose the **size-up trigger**. _Trailing 30 days · read-only · nothing leaves your workspace._

**Filters drive the recommendation.** *Percentile*: **Max** = size for the worst spike (aggressive) · **p95** (default) · **p50** = typical moment (conservative). *Size-up trigger*: **Frequency** = ≥10% of queries spilled (default) · **Intensity** = total spill ≥50% of bytes read (heavy spill even if rare) · **Peak volume** = any query spilled ≥5 GB. *Queue-wait threshold (sec)*: sets the KPI count (warehouses whose queue wait at the selected percentile ≥ that many seconds).

frame.title: Where to act: wait vs. clusters to add (colored by action)

lines: **Recommended action** — *Add clusters* = queries queue at capacity (raise the max scaling limit, ≈1 cluster per 10 concurrently-queued queries **at the selected percentile**). *Size up* = queries spill to disk (out of memory → bump the t-shirt size). *Add clusters + size up* = both. Thresholds are heuristics — confirm in the warehouse monitoring page. Warehouse shown by **ID** (find it under SQL Warehouses).

frame.title: All warehouses to scale up (add clusters and/or size up)

lines: Queries here **spilled to local disk** — they ran out of memory, so a **bigger warehouse** (more memory) is the fix, not more clusters. **Size up?** reflects the selected *Size-up trigger* filter. *Scale up to* suggests the next t-shirt size. Magnitude columns: **Spill:read ratio** (spill vs data processed — the intensity signal), **Max/Total spill (GB)**. Confirm against the warehouse monitoring page.
